description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers, primarily white with black overlays and detailing. The shoes feature a prominent Nike Swoosh logo on the side panels and 'NIKE AIR' branding on the heel. The upper is constructed from smooth synthetic leather with visible stitching, and the toe box, tongue, and lacing area are reinforced for durability. The laces are white and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, threading through evenly spaced eyelets. The midsole is thick and white, with 'AIR' embossed on the lateral side, and the outsole appears to have a fine, grippy tread. The overall appearance is clean, structured, and suitable for casual or urban streetwear.
description: A pair of white and black Nike Air sneakers with prominent branding, smooth synthetic leather, and a classic athletic silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box, lacing area, and Nike logo on the tongue; left shoe is mostly in shadow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Nike Swoosh, 'AIR' branding on the midsole, and the layered panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'NIKE AIR' branding on the heel tab and the overall heel structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lateral Swoosh and the layered construction visible; left shoe is mostly in shadow.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on side panels, white 'NIKE AIR' text on heel, white Nike logo on tongue label
